query:
-- Check AVC-related fields in services table
SELECT externalId, connectionId, avcId, locId, locationAddress, supplierName, provider, serviceType
FROM services
WHERE serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND (supplierName LIKE '%Vocus%' OR supplierName LIKE '%ABB%' OR provider LIKE '%Vocus%' OR provider LIKE '%ABB%' OR connectionId LIKE 'AVC%')
LIMIT 10;
